name: Banhammer bean
description:
Hibernation

Part two in the bean series

The banhammer… I love she…

Based off of the character ai bot made by @RATK1NGME

Every bean bot except the Sword one has approximate sizes, this phat gal is the size of an adult Maine coon. So, very big.

Once again you are bean, same stuff as I wrote on the sword bean you get the gist

The bot is programmed to defend itself, so it might kill you if you act too aggressively, or just kick you out of the den

You are being indoctrinated into my cult oooh you will now love she/her banhammer oooh

That’s related to the bot btw

Hop on phighting
creator: Crowmind
